hitl_criteria: Opening a 270 file in WPF renders the subscriber/EQ tree without error
Dependent node is visible when dependent present in fixture
WPF file open dialog label reads 'Open X12 EDI File'
completed_criteria: X270DocumentParser.ParseFile returns the correct subscriber count from the fixture
Each X270Subscriber exposes SubscriberId and SubscriberName
Dependent loop populates X270Dependent with PatientName when present
Each X270ServiceTypeQuery exposes the raw EQ service type code
X270Interpreter.Interpret resolves EQ service type code 30 to a non-empty plain-English description
Unknown EQ code falls back to '{code} (unrecognized code)'
X270Validator.Validate returns zero errors for a well-formed fixture
Missing subscriber loop produces a validation error
No EQ segments produces a validation error
X270TreeBuilder.Build produces subscriber nodes as children of root
Dependent node appears as child of subscriber node when dependent is present
EQ service type nodes appear with plain-English description labels
CLI parse auto-detects ST01=270 and routes to X270DocumentParser
CLI interpret on a 270 fixture emits JSON with plain-English service type descriptions
Existing 271, 835, and 277 CLI tests pass unchanged

hitl_criteria: Opening an 837P file in WPF renders the full billing provider → claim → service line tree
Selecting a claim node shows plain-English summary in the interpretation pane
Selecting a service line node shows plain-English service line detail
WPF CSV export menu item is enabled when 837P is loaded
Exported 837P CSV opens in Excel with correct columns and one row per service line
Opening an 837I file in WPF renders the institutional claim tree with CL1 node visible
Selecting a claim node shows CL1 admission detail in the interpretation pane
Exported 837I CSV opens in Excel with correct columns including RevenueCode and RevenueDescription
Opening a 999 file in WPF renders the functional group → transaction set tree
Accepted and rejected transaction set nodes are visually distinguishable in the tree
Selecting a rejected transaction set node shows IK3/IK4 error detail in the interpretation pane
